data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — tests in tests/scripts/test-jira-credential-helper.sh, RED marker at [test_detect_all_vars_set] in .test-index, helper script needs: DETECTED/MISSING output, GUIDANCE_DESC/GUIDANCE_URL lines, CONFIRM_BEFORE_COPY marker, --project=KEY flag, JIRA_PROJECT=KEY output
